news.headline: UnitedHealth Group stock crashes following investigation by Trump administration on Medicare Advantage billing probe.
news.summary: The Trump administration Justice Department is currently investigating UnitedHealth Group. Reports indicate that the company's stock has dramatically dropped due to a billing probe related to Medicare Advantage.

news.headline: Coinbase stock surges after SEC drops case, CEO Brian Armstrong declares victory. Bitcoin price rises.
news.summary: Coinbase stock experienced a significant surge on Friday following CEO Brian Armstrong's announcement that the SEC had agreed to dismiss its case against the crypto exchange. This news resulted in shares jumping, with Bitcoin also seeing a climb in value. This event marked a triumph for Coinbase, propelling its stocks and boosting confidence in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Trump eyes tariffs to counter digital taxes hated by big tech.
Trump to direct the USTR to weigh digital tax remedies - People Familiar.
Yankees breaking tradition, will now allow beards - per Bloomberg.

Freight Technologies appoints 2 new independent directors, Leilei Nie and Andres Gonzalez, replacing Paul Freudenthaler and William Samuels.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Freight Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: FRGT), known as Fr8Tech, a leader in logistics management innovations, announced the appointment of Leilei Nie and Andres Gonzalez to its board of directors, effective February 14, 2025. This decision came after the resignations of Paul Freudenthaler and William Samuels, who had informed the Board of their intent to step down. The resignations were amicable, with Mr. Freudenthaler retaining his position as the Board's secretary. These changes bring the number of independent directors on the Board to two, strengthening the company's governance structure.

news.headline: RaySearch Laboratories AB proposes dividend of 3.00 SEK per share for full-year 2024 with a proposed record day of May 26, 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, the Board of RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) put forward a dividend proposal for the fiscal year 2024 amounting to 3.00 SEK per share (0.70). The suggested record day for the dividend is May 26, 2025, with the payment slated for May 30, 2025. Additionally, the Year-end...

news.headline: Soulful crooner J. Poww releases album "I Did It My Way" with 10 covers, resuscitating R&B.
news.summary: In Detroit on February 21, 2025, soulful R&B artist J. Poww released his new album "I Did It My Way" on Powwer Moves Records. This album features 10 soulful covers and is receiving acclaim for its rejuvenation of R&B music.

news.headline: Class-action suit filed against TransMedics Group (TMDX) alleging fraud and safety lapses; company faces legal challenges.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 21, 2025, a class-action lawsuit was initiated against TransMedics Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMDX), a medical technology firm renowned for organ transplant therapy. The lawsuit accused the company and specific executives of involvement in deceitful activities.

news.headline: Canada's Buy Now Pay Later market is set to hit $6.69 billion by 2030. Expected to grow 12% annually, reaching $7.5 billion in 2025 with a CAGR of 19.7% during 2021-2024.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Canada Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities Databook - Q1 2025 Update" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report highlights key performance indicators (KPIs) on the Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market in Canada, including market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics. The BNPL payment market in Canada is projected to increase by 12.0% annually, reaching US$7.50 billion by 2025. From 2021 to 2024, the BNPL market saw significant growth with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.7%.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
G-20 Foreign Ministers urge more work to meet development goals.
Adden Energy commissions R&D pilot line for dynamically-stable batteries, outperforming market ones.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Adden Energy has launched a cutting-edge production line to create batteries that far surpass existing models. These batteries capitalize on dynamic-stability, a scientific breakthrough from Harvard, to revolutionize both their structure and production. Leveraging this innovation, the batteries amalgamate two state-of-the-art technologies – lithium metal batteries and dynamic-stability. This advancement enables enhanced performance and efficiency in battery production.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent and China's He agreed to remain in communication.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent expressed concerns about China's unfair policies.
NVIDIA GTC 2025 showcases AI's impact on climate, disaster response, and conservation, leading to a sustainable future. #tech #environment #NW2025.
news.summary: During the NVIDIA GTC 2025 event, specialists delve into the significant influence of AI on climate prediction, emergency management, and nature preservation. They demonstrate innovative solutions that pave the way for a sustainable future. The event highlighted how AI is revolutionizing these areas, with a focus on cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Indonesia's BNPL market to hit $8.59 billion by 2025, led by Akulaku and Kredivo. Expected 13.5% annual growth.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on Indonesia's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) business and investment opportunities has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com, providing insights into over 75 key performance indicators (KPIs) on the BNPL market. The report forecasts a 13.5% annual growth rate for Indonesia's BNPL payment market, projecting it to reach US$8.59 billion by 2025. The country's BNPL market demonstrated strong expansion between 2021-2024, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) achieved during this period.

news.headline: Tripadvisor beats Q4 estimates with EPS of $0.30, 42.86% surprise over $0.21, revenue at $411M. JPMorgan cautious on 2025 outlook due to headwinds.
news.summary: Tripadvisor Inc. reported robust fourth quarter earnings, surpassing expectations with earnings per share of $0.30, marking a 42.86% beat from the estimated $0.21. The company's revenue reached $411 million, exceeding predictions by 2.75%. Although the Q4 performance was strong, JPMorgan analyst Doug Anmuth holds a pessimistic view on the stock, maintaining an Underweight rating due to various challenges ahead. Factors such as holiday timing, challenging comparisons, and foreign exchange effects are anticipated to impact the first quarter guidance. Management anticipates that growth in 2025 will be skewed towards the latter part of the year due to tough pricing comparisons in the first half related to hotel meta. However, Anmuth suggests a potential reversal in 2026 with an expected acceleration in both revenue and profits. For more insights, the full news story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 'Gary Cardone' sells 30,000 XRP at $2.71, shares six rules influencing the decision. Hopes XRP army gets rich.
news.summary: Prominent anonymous investment influencer ‘Gary Cardone,’ distinct from Grant Cardone, recently revealed his decision to sell off his XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) investment. Cardone shared that he offloaded 30,000 XRP tokens at $2.71 each on Friday through a post on X platform. He explained that his choice was influenced by six principles he has developed over four decades in the financial sector. In a viral statement, he expressed his well wishes for the XRP community to achieve great wealth, although he personally remains skeptical about the possibility. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Greenwave expects higher revenue with Trump's copper tariffs. Revenue guidance raised to $47-50M for FY2025. Supplies to major companies.
news.summary: The announcement of copper tariffs by President Trump is imminent, with expectations of increased revenue for Greenwave. The higher the tariff set, the more revenue the company is projected to generate. Greenwave has recently updated its revenue guidance to be between $47 million and $50 million for Fiscal Year 2025. Noteworthy clients of Greenwave include Nucor, Sims Metal, Cleveland-Cliffs, and Georgia-Pacific.

news.headline: Exchange Traded Concepts will close & liquidate The Optica Rare Earths & Critical Materials ETF. Termination approved.
news.summary: Oklahoma City, February 21, 2025 - Following thorough evaluation, Exchange Traded Concepts, LLC, the investment adviser for the Fund, has proposed the termination and liquidation of the Fund. The Board of Trustees of Exchange Traded Concepts Trust has endorsed this recommendation. This decision was made in accordance with the trustees' approval.

news.headline: Darcy Stacom and Wendy Silverstein create StacomSilverstein, a boutique real estate firm in NYC after a year of Stacom CRE.
news.summary: In New York on February 21, 2025, Darcy Stacom and Wendy Silverstein revealed the launch of their new collaboration, StacomSilverstein. The partnership comes one year after the establishment of Stacom CRE. This boutique capital markets real estate advisory firm is woman-owned and headquartered in New York City. Bringing together their expertise, the firm aims to provide specialized services in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Illumina and Broad Clinical Labs partner to scale single-cell solutions, aiming for a 5 billion single-cell atlas ecosystem in 3 years.
news.summary: Two well-established collaborators have integrated full workflows and advanced CRISPR Perturb-seq technologies, establishing a new benchmark for single-cell research. This partnership aims to create a vast ecosystem containing 5 billion single-cell data points within a span of three years. The announcement was made on Feb. 21, 2025, in San Diego, marking a significant milestone in the field. Illumina, Inc. (NASDAQ: ILMN) is spearheading this initiative, ensuring a revolutionary advancement in single-cell studies.

news.headline: Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV) to present at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media and Telecom Conference on March 4.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, Revolve Group, Inc. (NYSE: RVLV), a fashion retailer catering to Millennial and Generation Z shoppers, announced its participation in upcoming investor conferences. The company will be presenting at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media, and Telecom Conference on Tuesday, March 4. This move signifies Revolve's proactive approach in engaging with stakeholders and showcasing its business strategies. It reflects the company's commitment to transparency and investor relations amidst a dynamic market landscape.

news.headline: Thesis-backed Fold goes public on Nasdaq, a milestone for Bitcoin financial services, targeting average consumers.
news.summary: Thesis has achieved a significant accomplishment by introducing its listing, representing a key advancement in Bitcoin-native financial innovation. The focus is on granting everyday consumers entry to cryptocurrency products. This news was announced on February 21, 2025, in New York. Thesis stands as the venture studio responsible for several influential initiatives in the field.

news.headline: Brainiest AI introduces revamped interface & applets for SEO, text summarization, and AI-generated images. Improving accessibility for marketers and creators. Scottsdale, Arizona - Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance usability and effectiveness for marketers, content creators, SEO specialists, and businesses, enhancements have been introduced to Brainiest AI, an advanced online marketing platform. These updates are designed to bolster accessibility, productivity, and functionality. Situated in Scottsdale, Arizona, the changes were unveiled on February 21, 2025. Brainiest AI operates as an all-encompassing solution powered by artificial intelligence, catering to companies focused on maximizing their online presence.

news.headline: PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. finalizes $474.6 million securitization, cuts borrowing costs significantly.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, it was reported that PennantPark Floating Rate Capital Ltd. (NYSE: PFLT) successfully finalized a term debt securitization deal worth $474.6 million. This transaction involves a four-year reinvestment period and a twelve-year final maturity, structured as a collateralized loan obligation ("CLO").

news.headline: Kenya's BNPL market to reach $1.18 billion by 2025, growing at 13.6% annually. Market saw 23% CAGR during 2021-2024.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on "Kenya Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report provides insights into the BNPL market in Kenya, projecting a 13.6% annual growth rate to reach US$1.18 billion by 2025. From 2021 to 2024, the BNPL market in Kenya saw strong expansion, with a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 23. This data highlights the increasing prominence of BNPL services in the country's payment landscape.

news.headline: Solana's user activity drops by 40% due to memecoin rug pulls, leading to outflows to Ethereum and Arbitrum. Analysts foresee long-term benefits for Solana.
news.summary: An increase in fraud and deception schemes with Solana memecoins, along with sudden withdrawals of funds, have been prompting the movement of capital towards Ethereum and Arbitrum. This trend has led to a decrease in user engagement on Solana. However, experts suggest that this shift could potentially have positive implications for Solana in the future.

news.headline: US administration believes Kurdish oil sales can help to lower oil prices, offset drop in Iranian supplies — sources.
Tempter's hemp-infused brand sponsors WSWA Access LIVE 2025, largest alcohol conf, with country music and innovation.
news.summary: A well-known hemp-infused drink brand, Tempter's, has secured the position of title sponsor at the largest alcohol industry conference. This significant development took place at WSWA's Access LIVE 2025 event in Knoxville, Tennessee, on February 21, 2025. Tempter's played a key role in sponsoring the opening and closing receptions at the conference, solidifying its presence in the industry. This move further establishes Tempter's as a prominent player in the market, showcasing its commitment to growth and visibility.

news.headline: Kiehl's releases Ultra Facial Barrier-Hydrating Cleanser, soap-free cream-to-foam, gently cleanses and hydrates skin.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, a new product was launched by Kiehl's, known as the Ultra Facial Barrier-Hydrating Cleanser. This addition to the popular Ultra Facial line is a soap-free amino acid cream-to-foam cleanser designed to effectively remove impurities from the skin while providing hydration and support. The product aims to cater to individuals looking for a gentle yet effective cleanser.

news.headline: The US administration asked Iraq to resume Kurdish oil exports quickly or face sanctions alongside Iran - Sources.
MP Materials Corp. reported a 48% revenue surge in Q4, reaching $61.0 million, boosted by higher production and sales.
news.summary: Shares of MP Materials Corp. (NYSE:MP) are rising in premarket trading following the company's report of a 48% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter revenue to $61.0 million, surpassing the predicted $51.0 million. The boost in revenue was primarily fueled by higher sales in the Materials Segment, driven by increased NdPr oxide and metal sales from transitioning to midstream production. Despite a scheduled maintenance shutdown, the company was able to produce 11,478 metric tons of rare earth oxides (REO) in concentrate and sold 7,803 metric tons.

news.headline: Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ: DPZ) to release Q4 earnings. Analysts predict $4.91 per share, revenue of $1.48B. Stock target price: $500. Annual dividend yield: 1.27%.
news.summary: Before the market opening on Monday, Feb. 24, Domino’s Pizza, Inc. (NASDAQ:DPZ) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts are predicting quarterly earnings of $4.91 per share, a jump from $4.48 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.48 billion, an increase from $1.4 billion a year ago. RBC Capital analyst Logan Reich has reiterated an Outperform rating on Domino’s Pizza, with a maintained target price of $500. Investors are also interested in the company's dividends, as Domino’s currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.27%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share ($6.04 yearly). For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ATB Financial reports strong Q3 results for FY 2025, with $566.7M revenue, $53.6B net loans, $43.5B deposits, $203.7M other income.
news.summary: ATB Financial reported strong third-quarter results for fiscal year 2025, with total revenue reaching $566.7 million, a 9.4% increase from the previous year. Net loans increased by 5.5% to $53.6 billion, while total deposits rose by 8.3% to $43.5 billion. Other income grew to $203.7 million, showcasing the success of their advisory services. With $36.6 billion in assets under administration, ATB Financial solidified its position as a top investment firm in Western Canada. President and CEO Curtis Stange reassured clients about potential tariff impacts on the economy, emphasizing the organization's commitment to helping clients navigate the situation.

news.headline: Computerized sewing and embroidery machine market to grow at 4.8% CAGR, reaching USD 3.6 billion by 2035, driven by tech advancements and rising demand for personalized solutions in textile industries.
news.summary: The computerized sewing and embroidery machine market is poised for substantial growth, having reached a value of US$2.2 billion in 2024. It is expected to expand at a CAGR of 4.8% from 2025 to 2035, reaching US$3.6 billion by the end of 2035. This growth is fueled by technological advancements, automation in textile production, and a rising demand for personalized solutions. Key players in the market include Brother Industries, Janome Corporation, Bernina International AG, and Juki Corporation, who are investing in R&D for AI-equipped machines. The market offers intricate designs with minimal manual effort, appealing to sectors such as apparel manufacturing and home décor. Companies are introducing advanced features like AI-driven error detection and cloud-based design storage. Industry trends point towards machines with high-speed stitching capabilities and multi-needle configurations to meet evolving consumer needs. Key developments include Brother International Australia's new models catering to different industrial and home-based demands. The market snapshot indicates a forecast of US$3.6 billion by 2035 with a CAGR of 4.8%. Industries adopting these machines include apparel manufacturing, home décor, automotive textiles, and DIY crafts.

news.headline: Appotronics, listed on the STAR Market in China, to supply static automotive lights to a top automaker.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on Feb. 21, 2025, Appotronics (688007.SH), a leading firm on the STAR Market of the Shanghai Stock Exchange, disclosed getting a development notification from a major global car manufacturer. The notification designates...

news.headline: Sales at BJ's, Costco, PriceSmart and Sam's Club reach $431 billion in 2024 - Warehouse Club Focus Report.
news.summary: A newsletter called "Warehouse Club Focus" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This publication, started in 1997, provides exclusive reports on the warehouse club industry twice a month. Authored by a former club buyer, it has published over 655 issues to date. In 2024, sales at major clubs like BJ's, Costco, PriceSmart, and Sam's Club reached $431 billion. "Warehouse Club Focus" is highly regarded in the industry, with even the largest consumer packaged goods companies as regular readers.

news.headline: Invisors earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ in US and UK for the 5th consecutive year based on employee feedback.
news.summary: Invisors, with headquarters in Atlanta and Glasgow, Scotland, has recently achieved its 5th consecutive certification by Great Place To Work®. This recognition is solely determined by feedback from employees regarding their workplace satisfaction. The most recent surveys conducted showcase the positive experiences of Invisors' employees, solidifying its reputation as a top workplace for the 5th year.

news.headline: EU urged to unite by former Ambassador Ischinger on Germany, Ukraine, and Trump.Important message for EU leaders.
news.summary: In a recent study, researchers found that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, its lowest level in over a year. The economy added 678,000 jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations and marking a significant improvement in the labor market. The decrease in unemployment was seen across various sectors, with the service industry showing the most growth. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers increased by 2.5%, indicating potential wage growth in the near future. Overall, these findings point towards a positive trend in the US job market, reflecting a strengthening economy.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I also stressed the Trump Administration's commitment to trade and economic policies that protect US - Statement.
PioCreat 3D spins off HALOT series from Creality to meet market demand, merger announced, bold move.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China - On February 21, 2025, PioCreat 3D, an industrial-grade 3D printing brand founded by a Creality co-founder, has confirmed the integration of Creality's HALOT line of resin 3D printers into the PioCreat brand. This strategic decision enhances the product lineup of PioCreat, leveraging the established reputation of both brands. The merger aims at maximizing effectiveness and capitalizing on combined resources to strengthen the market position.

news.headline: WestKam Gold cancels deal to acquire Powerline One Uranium Project in Utah - covering 2,649 acres on 131 lode claims.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, WestKam Gold Corp. (TSX-V:WKG) revealed the termination of discussions to acquire a complete legal and beneficial stake in 131 lode claims situated in Grand County, Utah. The claims span over 2,649 acres (1,072 hectares) and constitute the Powerline One Project, marking the conclusion of negotiations for this significant land parcel.

news.headline: HBAR Foundation boosts institutional tokenization role by investing in Fidelity International's USD Money Market Fund, tokenized by Archax - LONDON, Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: The HBAR Foundation has received an investment that bolsters its position in institutional tokenization and aids in advancing Fidelity International's strategy for distributing digital assets. This development, disclosed on February 21, 2025, in London, underscores the Foundation's role in the industry. The investment marks a significant move for professional investors and comes with associated risks.

news.headline: OneCompass Holdings buys Aquinas Leadership Group to enhance training services for pharma industry. Acquisition announced on Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio on February 21, 2025, OneCompass Holdings (OCH), a renowned company specializing in cutting-edge business solutions, disclosed its recent acquisition of Aquinas. Aquinas is a top-notch firm offering sales and compliance training specifically tailored for the pharmaceutical and medical device sectors. This move is set to significantly impact the industry landscape, aligning the expertise of both companies to enhance services.

news.headline: Chinese animated film "Ne Zha 2" is a global hit, biggest blockbuster after five years, captivating viewers with a demon child.
news.summary: In Beijing on February 21, 2025, a report from China.org.cn highlighted the success of the Chinese animated film "Ne Zha 2: Demon Child Conquers the Sea." The movie, featuring the popular character with distinctive dark eye circles, has gone viral, making it the top blockbuster in China five years after its release. With record-breaking numbers at the box office, "Ne Zha 2" has captivated audiences nationwide, solidifying its status as a cultural phenomenon in the country.
